aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.subtitle: Learn about ZhiHui AI's development history and team
aboutUs.heroSubtitle: We turn LLMs and multimodal AI into reliable products and services. We give businesses and developers stable, easy-to-use AI capabilities and tools.
aboutUs.heroMission: Empowering every organization with AI, and every idea with better execution.

companyIntro.title: Who We Are
companyIntro.subtitle: Delivering AI capabilities into every application and every collaboration, through technology and product.
companyIntro.paragraph1: ZhiHui AI focuses on productizing and scaling AI. We connect leading LLMs and multimodal providers and expose them through unified APIs, workflows, and an open platform—so teams can adopt and iterate on AI faster and at lower cost.
companyIntro.paragraph2: Our team comes from the frontline of the internet and AI: we combine algorithm and engineering depth with real-world use cases. We believe AI creates value only when it is actually used. So we invest in reliability, usability, and scalability, and offer Ready-to-use solutions for collaboration, content creation, and agents.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Zhihui AI Society - Your AI Intelligent Assistant Platform
about.missionDescription: Zhihui AI Society is committed to providing users with the most advanced artificial intelligence tools and services, helping users improve work efficiency, stimulate creativity, and achieve more possibilities.
about.aiConversationDesc: Have natural and smooth conversations with AI to get intelligent suggestions and solutions
about.richToolkitDesc: Provide various AI tools to meet different scenario needs
about.professionalCommunityDesc: Gather industry experts to share experiences and insights
about.continuousInnovationDesc: Continuously update and optimize to provide the latest AI technology
about.teamDesc1: 10 years of AI industry experience, former technical director of a well-known technology company
about.teamDesc2: 8 years of product design experience, focusing on user experience and product innovation
about.teamDesc3: 12 years of software development experience, proficient in multiple programming languages and architecture design
about.We are committed to building a world-lea: We are committed to building a world-leading AI application platform, enabling everyone to use AI with ease and driving social progress and innovation.
about.Our mission is to lower the barrier to A: Our mission is to lower the barrier to AI adoption so that every person and every business can easily access AI capabilities. We believe AI should serve all of humanity.

features.globalDesc: Services covering 50+ countries and regions, supporting multilingual localization
